CREATE TABLE snowflake_test (id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO snowflake_test SELECT generateSnowflakeID();
SELECT * FROM snowflake_test;
CREATE TABLE concurrent_test (id UInt64, machine_id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO concurrent_test SELECT generateSnowflakeID(1), generateSnowflakeID(2) FROM numbers(10);
SELECT * FROM concurrent_test;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO nested_test SELECT (SELECT generateSnowflakeID());
SELECT (SELECT generateSnowflakeID() + 1), (SELECT generateSnowflakeID() + 2) FROM numbers(1);
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt64, machine_id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO join_test SELECT generateSnowflakeID(1), generateSnowflakeID(2) FROM join_test;
SELECT a.id, b.machine_id FROM (SELECT generateSnowflakeID() AS id FROM numbers(5)) AS a JOIN (SELECT generateSnowflakeID(2) AS machine_id FROM numbers(5)) AS b ON a.id % 3 = b.machine_id % 3;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (id UInt64, machine_id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO complex_test SELECT generateSnowflakeID(1), generateSnowflakeID(2) FROM numbers(1000);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM complex_test GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 10;
SELECT generateSnowflakeID() FROM (SELECT id FROM complex_test WHERE machine_id = 2) AS filtered WHERE filtered.id > 100;
CREATE TABLE f_prime_test (id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO f_prime_test SELECT generateSnowflakeID();
SELECT generateSnowflakeID() + (SELECT MAX(id) FROM f_prime_test) FROM numbers(5);
CREATE TABLE overflow_test (id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO overflow_test SELECT generateSnowflakeID() FROM numbers(2000);
SELECT id FROM overflow_test ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
